string.name: EntryAbility_desc
string.value: Explore the mysteries of world flags

string.name: vibrate_permission_reason
string.value: For providing haptic feedback during operations

string.name: internet_permission_reason
string.value: For downloading voice models and online voice services

string.name: app_welcome_subtitle
string.value: Explore the mysteries of world flags

string.name: optional_module_anthem_detail
string.value:
Includes national anthem audio for many countries. After installation, an "Anthems" tab appears on the home screen for browsing, search, and playback.

The pack is large and is downloaded on demand over the network; it may take several minutes. Keep your connection stable.

string.name: optional_module_flaghistory_detail
string.value:
Includes historical flag images and descriptions. After installation, you can view a country's past flags on the flag detail page.

Download requires a network connection; please wait until it finishes.

string.name: optional_module_dialog_after_download_hint
string.value: Download has started. You can tap "Close" anytime; the download continues in the background. You can also check progress at the top of the app.

string.name: optional_module_dialog_toast_after_download
string.value: Download started — you can close this window

string.name: optional_module_dialog_installed_hint
string.value: This pack is installed. You can use the related features now.

string.name: optional_module_anthem_size_hint
string.value: Download size about 150 MB (approximate; see AppGallery for actual size)

string.name: optional_module_flaghistory_size_hint
string.value: Download size about 45 MB (approximate; see AppGallery for actual size)

string.name: optional_module_state_flags_detail
string.value:
Administrative region flag images. After installation, use State Flags on the home screen and the US states category in the paint game.

Requires a network download.

string.name: optional_module_state_flags_size_hint
string.value: Download size about 20 MB (approximate; see AppGallery for actual size)

string.name: optional_module_coat_of_arms_detail
string.value:
Coat-of-arms images for countries. After installation, they appear on flag detail pages where available.

Requires a network download.

string.name: optional_module_coat_of_arms_size_hint
string.value: Download size about 5 MB (approximate; see AppGallery for actual size)

string.name: optional_module_anthem_entry
string.value: Find it on the home screen under the "Anthems" tab

string.name: optional_module_flaghistory_entry
string.value: On any country flag page, open "Historical flags"

string.name: optional_module_state_flags_entry
string.value: Home — "State flags"; paint game — "US states" category

string.name: optional_module_coat_of_arms_entry
string.value: On flag detail pages — coat of arms when available

string.name: optional_module_missing_message
string.value: This page requires "%s". Tap the button below to download it in-app.

string.name: optional_module_toast_anthem_ready
string.value: Anthems pack is ready — use the second tab.

string.name: optional_module_download_started_detail
string.value: Downloading "%s". The pack is large and may take several minutes. Keep the network connected. You can see progress at the top of the app.

string.name: optional_module_downloading_banner
string.value: Downloading "%s"… This may take a few minutes.

string.name: optional_module_download_failed
string.value: Failed to download "%s". Try again later.

string.name: home_paint_entry_subtitle
string.value: Color flags and learn them through play

string.name: explore_flag_quiz_desc
string.value: Guess country by flag, guess flag by country

string.name: explore_fake_flag_desc
string.value: Find the fake flag among four flags

string.name: explore_spelling_desc
string.value: Look at the flag, type the country name

string.name: explore_memory_desc
string.value: Flip cards and match pairs to train memory

string.name: explore_connections_desc
string.value: Group flags into four themed groups

string.name: explore_headsup_desc
string.value: Quickly identify flags, challenge your reaction

string.name: headsup_tutorial_message
string.value:
• Tap the screen to see the answer
• Tap again for the next flag
• 10 flags per session

string.name: app_tagline
string.value: Explore the world, starting with flags 🚩

string.name: paint_instruction_1
string.value: 1. Select a color from the palette

string.name: paint_instruction_2
string.value: 2. Tap or drag on flag areas to fill colors

string.name: paint_instruction_3
string.value: 3. Complete the painting in the correct color order

string.name: paint_instruction_4
string.value: 4. Each level contains multiple flags or state flags, complete all correctly to pass

string.name: all_levels_completed
string.value: You have completed all {category} painting levels!

string.name: connections_hint
string.value: Group into four groups of four. Select and find all to pass.

string.name: cannot_open_app_market
string.value: Cannot open app market, please go to app market to rate manually

string.name: about_app_message
string.value:
Flag Wiki 1.1.0

An interesting flag knowledge app that takes you to explore the stories and history of world flags.

string.name: feedback_message
string.value: If you have suggestions or questions, please leave a comment in the app store, or send an email to ssz2048@163.com. Thank you for your support.

string.name: share_app_text
string.value:
Flag Wiki - An interesting flag knowledge app that takes you to explore the stories and history of world flags.

Download link: {url}

string.name: share_app_description
string.value: Explore the mysteries of world flags

string.name: topic_vexillology_desc
string.value: Basic knowledge, research methods, and historical evolution of vexillology (flag studies)

string.name: topic_etiquette_desc
string.value: Standards and etiquette for flag use in international settings

string.name: topic_manufacturing_desc
string.value: Process, materials, factories, and quality standards for flag manufacturing

string.name: topic_flag_history
string.value: History of the Five-star Red Flag

string.name: topic_flag_history_desc
string.value: Design background, evolution, legal status, and cultural significance of the Five-star Red Flag

string.name: topic_similar_flags_desc
string.value: National flags with high similarity, differing only in proportions, color depth, or details

string.name: topic_nordic_desc
string.value: Scandinavian flags featuring the Nordic cross

string.name: topic_tricolor_desc
string.value: Classic flag design with three color stripes

string.name: topic_pan_arab_desc
string.value: Flags using pan-Arab colors: red, white, black, and green

string.name: topic_pan_african_desc
string.value: Flags using pan-African colors: red, yellow, and green

string.name: topic_sun_desc
string.value: Countries with sun patterns on their flags

string.name: topic_crescent_moon_desc
string.value: Countries with crescent moon symbols on their flags

string.name: topic_animals_desc
string.value: Countries with animal patterns on their flags

string.name: topic_blue_ensign_desc
string.value: British civil ensign, Union Jack represents former British colonies, symbolizing Commonwealth membership

string.name: topic_pan_slavic_desc
string.value: Flags using pan-Slavic colors: red, white, and blue, representing Slavic unity

string.name: topic_central_america_desc
string.value: Central American Federal flag, blue represents Caribbean and Pacific, white represents peace, adopted by many former Central American Federal Republic members

string.name: topic_miranda_desc
string.value: Flag used by Francisco de Miranda in the South American independence movement, red represents South America, yellow represents Spain, blue represents the sea. Later adopted by former Gran Colombia Republic members

string.name: watch_org_detail_unavailable
string.value: International organization details are unavailable on watch

string.name: fun_fact_1
string.value: 🇳🇵 Nepal has the world's only non-rectangular flag, made of two triangles!

string.name: fun_fact_2
string.value: 🇨🇭 Switzerland and Vatican City are the only two countries with square flags!

string.name: fun_fact_3
string.value: 🇯🇵 The red circle on Japan's flag represents the sun, Japan is called the "Land of the Rising Sun"!

string.name: fun_fact_4
string.value: 🇱🇾 Libya used the world's only solid-color flag (green) from 1977-2011!

string.name: fun_fact_5
string.value: 🇲🇨 Monaco and Indonesia have almost identical flags, differing only in aspect ratio!

string.name: fun_fact_6
string.value: 🇩🇰 Denmark's flag is the world's oldest flag, in use since 1219!

string.name: fun_fact_7
string.value: 🇧🇷 Brazil's flag has 27 stars representing 26 states and 1 federal district!

string.name: fun_fact_8
string.value: 🇺🇸 The US flag has 50 stars for 50 states, and 13 stripes for the original 13 colonies!

string.name: fun_fact_9
string.value: 🇨🇦 Canada's maple leaf has 11 points, designed for maximum clarity in wind tunnel tests!

string.name: fun_fact_10
string.value: 🇬🇧 The UK's "Union Jack" combines the flags of England, Scotland, and Ireland!

string.name: cannot_open_market_manual
string.value: Cannot open app market, please manually go to app market for rating

string.name: quiz_flag_to_name_desc
string.value: Select the correct country name based on the flag pattern

string.name: quiz_name_to_flag_desc
string.value: Select the correct flag pattern based on the country name

string.name: complete_levels_to_unlock
string.value: Complete each level challenge to unlock more levels

string.name: modify_keywords_or_select
string.value: Modify keywords or select "All" or other continents
